response.justification: The candidate is a highly experienced full-stack engineer with strong TypeScript, Node.js, and React skills that exceed the technical requirements, plus relevant LLM/MCP and Kubernetes exposure from the nice-to-have list. However, this is an entry-level position and the candidate has roughly 15+ years of experience at senior and staff levels, creating a significant overqualification mismatch with likely salary and retention risks. The candidate is also based in São Paulo while the role requires high on-site presence, and PostgreSQL/Nest.js are not explicitly evidenced.
strengths: Deep TypeScript, Node.js, and React production experience across multiple companies
LLM/AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling experience matching nice-to-have qualifications
Kubernetes, Docker, and AWS (CDK) experience with strong testing and clean-architecture practices
concerns: Severely overqualified for an entry-level role — flight and salary-mismatch risk
Located in São Paulo, conflicting with the high on-site presence requirement
No explicit PostgreSQL or Nest.js experience; database background is primarily MongoDB/MySQL

key_factors.factor: TypeScript/React/Node stack match plus LLM experience
